apex_test_suite_add_text: SFDX: Add Tests to Apex Test Suite
apex_test_last_class_run_text: SFDX: Re-Run Last Run Apex Test Class
apex_test_last_method_run_text: SFDX: Re-Run Last Run Apex Test Method
apex_test_suite_name_not_determined_mess: Suite name could not be determined for suite execution
apex_test_suite_debug_not_supported_mess: Test suites cannot be debugged. Please debug individual test classes or methods.
apex_testing_discovery_source_descriptio: Select the source for Apex test discovery.
apex_testing_discovery_source_ls_descrip: Use the Language Server (LS) for discovery.
apex_testing_discovery_source_api_descri: Use the Tooling API Test Discovery endpoint for discovery.
apex_testing_use_test_explorer_descripti: Use the VS Code Test Explorer for Apex tests. When enabled, the new Test Explorer UI will be shown instead of the traditional Apex Test View.
apex_generate_unit_test_class_text: SFDX: Create Apex Unit Test Class
apex_test_retrieve_org_only_class_text: SFDX: Retrieve Org-Only Apex Test Class
apex_test_output_format_description: Format for test result reports. Markdown provides rich formatting with tables and code blocks. Text provides plain text output for minimal environments.
apex_test_output_format_markdown_descrip: Markdown format with tables, code blocks, and rich formatting (default)
apex_test_output_format_text_description: Plain text format for minimal environments
apex_test_sort_order_description: Sort order for test results in reports. Runtime sorts by execution time (slowest first), Coverage sorts by code coverage (lowest first), Severity sorts by combined issues (worst first).
apex_test_sort_order_runtime_description: Sort by runtime - slowest tests first (default)
apex_test_sort_order_coverage_descriptio: Sort by coverage - lowest coverage first
apex_test_sort_order_severity_descriptio: Sort by severity - tests with both poor performance and poor coverage first
apex_test_performance_threshold_descript: Performance threshold in milliseconds. Tests taking longer than this threshold will be highlighted as poorly performing. Default is 5000ms (5 seconds).
apex_test_coverage_threshold_description: Coverage threshold as a percentage. Tests with coverage below this threshold will be highlighted as poorly covered. Default is 75%.
retrieve_test_code_coverage_text: Specifies whether code coverage results are calculated and retrieved when you run Apex tests.
apex_disable_warnings_for_missing_covera: Disable UI warning when Apex test coverage is missing.
apex_testing_walkthrough_open_command: SFDX: Open Apex Test Explorer Walkthrough
apex_testing_walkthrough_description: Browse tests from your org, run classes or single methods, use test suites, filter the tree, and read results in the Test Results panel.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step1_title: See tests available in the org
apex_testing_walkthrough_step1_descripti:
Open the **Testing** view (flask icon in the Activity Bar). Under **Apex Tests**, the extension lists test classes and methods from your default org (namespaces, packages, then classes). Authorize a default org if the tree is empty.

[Open Testing view](command:workbench.view.extension.test)
apex_testing_walkthrough_step2_title: Run a test class or a single method
apex_testing_walkthrough_step2_descripti: Expand a class and use **Run Test** on the **class** row to run every `@IsTest` method in that class. Expand one level further and use **Run Test** on a **method** row to run only that test. **Debug Test** works the same way (org-only tests cannot be debugged).
apex_testing_walkthrough_step3_title: View and run Apex test suites
apex_testing_walkthrough_step3_descripti: At the top of **Apex Tests**, open **Apex Test Suites**. Expand a suite once to load its classes, then **Run Test** on the suite. You can also use **SFDX: Run Apex Test Suite** from the Command Palette.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step4_title: Filter by tag, text, or exclude (!)
apex_testing_walkthrough_step4_descripti: Use the filter box on the Testing view: type text to match names, `@in-workspace` / `@org-only` / `@test-suite` for tags, and prefix with `!` to exclude matches. Choose **Run In-Workspace Tests** from the run profile dropdown to execute only in-workspace tests.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step5_title: See results in the Test Results tab
apex_testing_walkthrough_step5_descripti: After a run, the tree shows pass/fail; expand failures for details. Open the **Test Results** panel for the full output. Enable **salesforcedx-vscode-apex-testing.test-run-concise** if you want the UI to emphasize failures.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step1_alt: Test Explorer showing Apex Test Suites, namespaces, and test classes expanded with methods.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step2_alt: Same Test Explorer view highlighting classes and test methods you can run or debug from the tree.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step3_alt: Apex Test Suites expanded with a suite and member test classes, with run and debug actions.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step4_alt: Filter field filtering tests by text with matching test methods shown in the tree.
apex_testing_walkthrough_step5_alt: Test Results panel with coverage tables, summary, and Apex Testing sidebar listing passed tests.
